{{CargoOrgan
|name=Devourer Fang
|type=Common
|rank=green
|id=10930
|idx=8
|description=Look at these rodent teeth. Those animals grind their teeth on literally everything they see. You might feel the same way after transplanting these fangs.
|skill=
|hp=370
|def=45
|atk=84
|rush=41
|gene1=In explorations, INTEL gained +2.5%
|gene2=In explorations, Demon God Cells collected +2%
|gene7=In explorations, Demon God Cells collected +2% (Awakened)
|}}
